0.text: Consolidation in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

1.text: Consolidation in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Surrounding ground-glass opacities in the medial segment of the right middle lobe and the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Subcentimeter centriacinar nodules adjacent to the described areas

4.text: Pneumonic infiltration in the middle and lower lobes of the right lung
